tasks.subject: Task 1: Branch + roadmap task files AW-270/271/272
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create branch docs/adr-0012-rollout and the three canonical task files in the AW-267 format.

**Files:**
- Create: docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-270-authorial-intent-block-and-fidelity-telemetry.md
- Create: docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-271-narrative-obligations-model.md
- Create: docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-272-continuity-coherence-eval-suite.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** branch checked out; three task files with 12 standard sections; AW-270/271 post-M6 flagged; no em dashes.

**Verify:** grep -l $'\u2014' docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-27[012]*.md || echo CLEAN -> CLEAN

**Steps:** Full file contents in plan doc Task 1 Steps 2-4; commit per Step 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-270-authorial-intent-block-and-fidelity-telemetry.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-271-narrative-obligations-model.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-272-continuity-coherence-eval-suite.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -l $'\\u2014' docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-27[012]*.md || echo CLEAN", "acceptanceCriteria": ["branch docs/adr-0012-rollout checked out", "three task files with 12 sections each", "AW-270/271 post-M6 flagged", "no em dashes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Epic M5-H file + M5 milestone update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the M5-H epic file and register it in the M5 milestone file with the AW-272 exit-gate line.

**Files:**
- Create: docs/roadmap/epics/M5-H-narrative-fidelity-layer.md
- Modify: docs/roadmap/milestones/M5-hardening-proof-prerequisites.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** epic file in M5-C format; milestone lists M5-H after M5-G; exit gate includes continuity eval line; no em dashes.

**Verify:** grep -c "M5-H" docs/roadmap/milestones/M5-hardening-proof-prerequisites.md -> 1

**Steps:** Full epic content and milestone edit lines in plan doc Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/roadmap/epics/M5-H-narrative-fidelity-layer.md", "docs/roadmap/milestones/M5-hardening-proof-prerequisites.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c \"M5-H\" docs/roadmap/milestones/M5-hardening-proof-prerequisites.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["epic file in M5-C format", "milestone epic list + exit gate updated", "no em dashes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: index.json manifest entries
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register M5-H and AW-270/271/272 in docs/roadmap/index.json (M5 epics array, epic entry, three task entries, github null until Task 7).

**Files:**
- Modify: docs/roadmap/index.json

**Acceptance Criteria:** M5-H in M5 epics array; epic entry with tasks [AW-272, AW-270, AW-271] github null; three task entries size M depends_on [] epic/epic_id M5-H github null; JSON parses.

**Verify:** python assert script in plan Task 3 -> OK

**Steps:** Python script in plan doc Task 3 Step 1; match neighboring key order.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/roadmap/index.json"], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"import json; d=json.load(open('docs/roadmap/index.json',encoding='utf-8-sig')); assert 'M5-H' in [e['id'] for e in d['epics']]; assert {'AW-270','AW-271','AW-272'} <= {t['id'] for t in d['tasks']}; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["M5-H in M5 epics array", "epic + 3 task entries added", "JSON parses"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Spec files 0064, 0065, 0066
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Author three per-feature specs from docs/specs/0000-template.md with the content cores in plan doc Task 4 (0064: authorial_intent JSON contract; 0065: obligations DDL + lifecycle; 0066: eval metrics + report format).

**Files:**
- Create: docs/specs/0064-aw-270-authorial-intent-block.md
- Create: docs/specs/0065-aw-271-narrative-obligations-model.md
- Create: docs/specs/0066-aw-272-continuity-coherence-evals.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** Status Approved, Author Founder + Claude (ADR-0012 rollout), Date 2026-07-11; each references ADR-0012 + AW task + architecture sections; exact contracts included; no em dashes.

**Verify:** grep -l "0012-authorial-intent" docs/specs/006[456]*.md | wc -l -> 3

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/specs/0064-aw-270-authorial-intent-block.md", "docs/specs/0065-aw-271-narrative-obligations-model.md", "docs/specs/0066-aw-272-continuity-coherence-evals.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -l \"0012-authorial-intent\" docs/specs/0064*.md docs/specs/0065*.md docs/specs/0066*.md | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["three specs from template", "exact contracts included", "ADR-0012 referenced in all"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Architecture section updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append Section 3.8 to 03-arc-execution.md, Section 11.8 to 11-telemetry.md, obligations table section to supplemental-schemas.md.

**Files:**
- Modify: docs/architecture/03-arc-execution.md
- Modify: docs/architecture/11-telemetry.md
- Modify: docs/architecture/supplemental-schemas.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** 3.8 covers intent + obligations contracts with spec pointers; 11.8 covers target_score, intent_fidelity_summary, obligation_created, obligation_resolved; DDL matches spec 0065; no em dashes in appended content.

**Verify:** grep -c "ADR-0012" on all three files -> nonzero each

**Steps:** Exact markdown blocks in plan doc Task 5 Steps 1-3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/architecture/03-arc-execution.md", "docs/architecture/11-telemetry.md", "docs/architecture/supplemental-schemas.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c \"ADR-0012\" docs/architecture/03-arc-execution.md docs/architecture/11-telemetry.md docs/architecture/supplemental-schemas.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3.8 appended", "11.8 appended", "obligations DDL appended matching spec 0065"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: PRD updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append the Narrative fidelity (ADR-0012) paragraph to 02-requirements.md (end of What the Platform Must Do) and the Future Directions bullet to 03-scope.md.

**Files:**
- Modify: docs/prd/02-requirements.md
- Modify: docs/prd/03-scope.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** both additions verbatim from plan doc Task 6; no em dashes.

**Verify:** grep -c "ADR-0012" docs/prd/02-requirements.md docs/prd/03-scope.md -> 1 each or more

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/prd/02-requirements.md", "docs/prd/03-scope.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c \"ADR-0012\" docs/prd/02-requirements.md docs/prd/03-scope.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["requirements paragraph appended", "scope bullet appended"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: GitHub issues + manifest backfill
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create 1 epic + 3 task issues (labels Epic/task, size:M, M5; milestone M5: Hardening + Proof Prerequisites; bodies from roadmap files), then backfill issue numbers into index.json.

**Files:**
- Modify: docs/roadmap/index.json (github objects for M5-H, AW-270, AW-271, AW-272)

**Acceptance Criteria:** four issues with correct titles/labels/milestone/bodies; index.json github objects carry issue_number + url; JSON parses.

**Verify:** gh issue list --repo nickejanssen/arcwright --label M5 --search "AW-27" shows the three tasks; python check in plan Task 7 Step 3 -> OK

**Steps:** Exact gh commands in plan doc Task 7 Step 1; backfill script in Step 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/roadmap/index.json"], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"import json; d=json.load(open('docs/roadmap/index.json',encoding='utf-8-sig')); e=[x for x in d['epics'] if x['id']=='M5-H'][0]; assert e['github']['issue_number']; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 issues created with correct labels/milestone", "manifest backfilled"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Consistency sweep + PR
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run the cross-reference check script, confirm clean git status (no agent-local files; working tree fully committed; the cloud-deploy-runbook expansion lives on branch docs/cloud-deploy-runbook-expansion and must not appear), push branch, open PR, hand off to review-pr skill.

**Files:** none created; verification and PR only.

**Acceptance Criteria:** cross-ref script prints OK; git status is empty; PR open against main with approval-evidence body from plan Task 8 Step 3.

**Verify:** gh pr view --json url returns URL

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh pr view --json url", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cross-ref script OK", "clean status", "PR open"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
